svg.text: Orange, graphite, warm white, and steel grey applied to the current planet-plus-flare mark in a more contrast-heavy UI system.

g.text: This direction leans into graphite panels,
hot orange accents, warm white type, and a
darker Mars-like planet to make the brand
A stronger orange accent makes ranking, heat, and urgency read faster.
Dark cards and hotter accents make the flare feel native to the rest of the interface.
Orange tags call attention without relying on large filled blocks.
Warm white becomes the premium neutral across headlines and controls.
A sharper contrast system gives chips, rings, and toggles more hierarchy without losing the soft orbital shapes.
Orange drives action, warm white carries hierarchy, and graphite keeps the system grounded.
